reviews.comment:
La verdad nunca me sentí tan mal en un lugar ,llegué para hacerme socio y asegurar mis dos vehículos y una moto (partner 2017--duna 94---- fz 2018) y me trataron como uno que pide limosna ,la verdad no entiendo porque la gente que trabaja en esa oficina de Colón no están capacitados para el trabajo que tienen que realizar ?
Después dicen que la cosa está mal pero por tel al 0800 del acá todo perfecto ,pero personalmente en la oficina una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
I've never felt so bad in any place. I went there to become a member and insure my two cars and a motorcycle (a 2017 Partner, a 1994 Duna, and a 2018 FZ), and they treated me like I was begging for money. I really don't understand why the people who work in that Colón office aren't qualified for the job they're supposed to do.
Then they say things are bad, but on the phone at the 0800 number here, everything is perfect, but in person at the office, it's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJcF9xM3BnRRAB
